title: GovernanceDecision
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 19b.3 (added by canon 0.4.0, ADR-018). Owned by governance-service (epd2_governance_service.domain.GovernanceDecision). One entity with a decision_type discriminator (minimum: ballot_invalidation, technical_challenge_adjudication, result_finality_determination, mandate, oversight_directive). status is ONLY proposed/approved/rejected - 'superseded' is never a stored value; supersession is always derived by checking whether another decision's supersedes_decision_id points at this one. finality_outcome is only ever set (exactly once, at approval) when decision_type=result_finality_determination, and is a distinct type from the derived FinalityStatus read model. Immutable once approved/rejected - corrections are always new decisions with supersedes_decision_id set.
